step_rationale: Eicosanoid mediator amplifying post-PCI inflammatory response in STEMI.
mechanism: Eicosanoid metabolite driving adverse cardiovascular effects and plaque inflammation post-PCI.

references.title: Metabolomics reveal dynamic changes in eicosanoid profile in patients with ST-elevation myocardial infarction after percutaneous coronary intervention.
Use of metabolomic profiling in the study of arachidonic acid metabolism in cardiovascular disease.
